## Feature description

<!-- A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see. -->

## Problem it solves / use case

<!-- What problem does this feature address? Describe the specific use case or workflow that would benefit. -->

## Proposed Dart API

<!-- Sketch the API you'd like. Even a rough draft helps. -->

```dart
// Example usage of the proposed feature
```

## Vercel AI SDK v6 equivalent

<!-- If this mirrors a feature in the JavaScript Vercel AI SDK v6, link it here. -->

**Function / class name:** <!-- e.g. `generateText`, `streamText`, etc. -->
**Docs link:** <!-- e.g. https://sdk.vercel.ai/docs/reference/ai-sdk-core/generate-text -->

## Priority

<!-- How important is this to you? -->

- [ ] Nice-to-have — would improve DX but not blocking anything
- [ ] Important — needed for a real project, workaround exists
- [ ] Blocking — no workaround, cannot proceed without this

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Have you considered any alternative approaches or workarounds? -->

## Additional context

<!-- Any other context, links, or screenshots that might help. -->
